headlines.title: Energy secretary says White House is open to suspending gas tax amid soaring prices
headlines.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright told NBC News’ “Meet the Press” on Sunday that the Trump administration is “open to all ideas” to lower the cost of gas, including suspending the federal gas tax

headlines.title: Govs. Wes Moore and Sarah Huckabee Sanders highlight maternal health investments
headlines.description: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore and Arkansas Gov.

headlines.title: U.S. strikes more tankers after exchanging fire with Iran in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged fire near the Strait of Hormuz, raising questions about the negotiations to end the conflict.

headlines.title: ‘It has to be bipartisan’: Governors find solutions on maternal health
headlines.description: Gov. Wes Moore (D-Md.), Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders (R-Ark.) and philanthropist Olivia Walton join Meet the Press for a Common Ground conversation around maternal health.

headlines.title: Democratic strategist says ‘explosive’ DNC report could be released ‘in a matter of weeks’
headlines.description: Ashley Etienne, Matt Gorman, Jonathan Martin and Tyler Pager join the Meet the Press roundtable to discuss the latest in the midterm redistricting battle, and former Vice Pres. Kamala Harris’ call for the Democratic National Committee to release its report on her failed 2024 presidential bid.

headlines.title: Cory Booker says Democrats should ‘release the autopsy’ on Kamala Harris’ failed bid
headlines.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) tells Meet the Press the Democratic National Committee should release its report on the 2024 election but argued Democrats should stay focused on mobilizing voters in upcoming midterm elections and look ahead to a competitive 2028 Democratic primary.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Trump weighs firing Dr. Marty Makary as FDA chief
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is considering firing Dr. Marty Makary after simmering frustration with his performance as FDA chief, a source familiar with the matter says.

headlines.title: Saudis feared Trump’s Project Freedom would spur Iran to attack, officials say
headlines.description: Saudi officials were angered by President Donald Trump’s surprise announcement that the U.S. would start guiding ships through the Strait of Hormuz, fearing the move could spur more Iranian attacks on Gulf allies.

headlines.title: Republicans gain upper hand in redistricting fight, but they still face midterm headwinds
headlines.description: Back-to-back redistricting victories in court have Republicans gaining confidence.
